mapper.insert:
insert into test_product_item(check_item_pid, check_item_code, product_id, report_model_id, check_item_name, coordinate, icon, additional_fees, unit, sample_count, place, duration, frequency, difficulty, remark, check_price, is_available, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, logistics_costs) values
(#{entity.checkItemPid}, #{entity.checkItemCode}, #{entity.productId}, #{entity.reportModelId}, #{entity.checkItemName}, #{entity.coordinate}, #{entity.icon}, #{entity.additionalFees}, #{entity.unit}, #{entity.sampleCount}, #{entity.place}, #{entity.duration}, #{entity.frequency}, #{entity.difficulty}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.checkPrice}, #{entity.isAvailable}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.logisticsCosts})

insert into test_product_item(check_item_pid, check_item_code, product_id, report_model_id, check_item_name, coordinate, icon, additional_fees, unit, sample_count, place, duration, frequency, difficulty, remark, check_price, is_available, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, logistics_costs) values
(#{entity.checkItemPid}, #{entity.checkItemCode}, #{entity.productId}, #{entity.reportModelId}, #{entity.checkItemName}, #{entity.coordinate}, #{entity.icon}, #{entity.additionalFees}, #{entity.unit}, #{entity.sampleCount}, #{entity.place}, #{entity.duration}, #{entity.frequency}, #{entity.difficulty}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.checkPrice}, #{entity.isAvailable}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.logisticsCosts})
on duplicate key update check_item_pid = values(check_item_pid) , check_item_code = values(check_item_code) , product_id = values(product_id) , report_model_id = values(report_model_id) , check_item_name = values(check_item_name) , coordinate = values(coordinate) , icon = values(icon) , additional_fees = values(additional_fees) , unit = values(unit) , sample_count = values(sample_count) , place = values(place) , duration = values(duration) , frequency = values(frequency) , difficulty = values(difficulty) , remark = values(remark) , check_price = values(check_price) , is_available = values(is_available) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , logistics_costs = values(logistics_costs)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT pt.check_item_id FROM test_report_template rt LEFT JOIN test_product_item pt ON rt.id = pt.report_model_id WHERE rt.del_flag=0 and pt.del_flag=0 and rt.report_file_uri like concat('%',#{url},'%')
SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(url,"/",-1) fileName FROM product_report_original_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_original_template t2 ON t1.report_original_id = t2.id WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT sheet_index FROM test_item_sheet_rel WHERE check_item_id = #{checkItemId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel
edit_data = 1, test_set_url = #{testSet}, record_set_url = #{recordSet},
WHERE id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS itemId, check_item_id as checkItemId, edit_data AS editData, origin_url_pdf AS originUrlPdf, check_item_code FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel WHERE id = #{itemId}

SELECT id AS itemId, check_item_id as checkItemId, edit_data AS editData, origin_url_pdf AS originUrlPdf, check_item_code, check_item_name, state, sign_url, test_set_url AS testSetUrl, record_set_url AS recordSetUrl, reviewed_by_set_url AS reviewedBySetUrl, contract_id FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel WHERE id IN
#{id}
